arts.ttl: Al Nassr make Cristiano Ronaldo contract decision
arts.sum: Saudi Pro League giants Al Nassr have reportedly made a decision regarding Cristiano Ronaldo's contract which expires in June.

arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo: "I would like to play with my 14-year-old son"
arts.sum: I would leave saying 'I can still make a difference for another year or two', that's why I live a lot in the present and I can't think long term." In addition to playing in another World Cup, one of Cristiano Ronaldo's dreams is to share the pitch with his son before he retires: "I would like to play with my 14-year-old son, but we'll see, it depends more on me than on him."

arts.ttl: Jhon Durán finds supporter after Aston Villa exit – Shouldn’t be criticised for taking the money
arts.sum: Jhon Durán was right to swap Aston Villa for Al-Nassr, as there’s no guarantee you’ll receive similar amounts in future. That’s according to former striker Oscar Córdoba, who has backed the former Aston Villa man in a conversation with Gol Caracol.
